summary: Verified Case Structuring drills UI fix. All 20 drills are correctly ordered (Easy→Medium→Hard), numbered sequentially (1-20), and display correct difficulty badges and time limits from API data.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: DrillsPage.jsx now correctly uses drill.difficulty_label for badge text
Fix verified: DrillsPage.jsx now correctly uses drill.time_limit for time display
Fix verified: getBadgeConfig helper function correctly maps difficulty_label to badge styling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Structuring drills feature is fully working. All 20 drills display correctly with proper ordering, numbering, badge colors, and time limits.

drill_sorting.evidence: Drills sorted by difficulty_label: Easy (1-8) → Medium (9-14) → Hard (15-20)

drill_numbering.evidence: All 20 drills numbered sequentially 1-20 based on sorted order

badge_display.evidence: Easy drills show green 'Easy' badge, Medium drills show yellow 'Medium' badge, Hard drills show rose 'Hard' badge

time_display.evidence: Easy drills show '5 min', Medium drills show '10 min', Hard drills show '15 min'

badge_colors.evidence: 8/8 Easy badges have emerald/green color, 6/6 Medium badges have yellow/#FFE6B7 color, 6/6 Hard badges have rose/red color
